§6Exposure Chamber§f

§aThe end-game machine that transmutes elements using exotic particles!§f

§bThe Exposure Chamber§f is an end-game machine that uses particles from the Particle Accelerator to transmute ingots into exotic materials. One particle capsule provides §e8 uses§f. Has an internal energy buffer of §e1.0 MHE§f and §e10 kHE/t§f base consumption.

§6Recipe§f (§bAssembly Machine§f):
§b• 12×§f Cast Aluminium Plate
§b• 4×§f Technetium Steel Ingot
§b• 12×§f Hard Plastic Bar
§b• 32×§f Dense Advanced Alloy Wire
§b• 2×§f Desh Motor
§b• 4×§f Versatile Circuit Board
§b• 1×§f Tantalium Capacitor Block
§b• 16×§f Quartz Glass

§6Transmutation Recipes§f:

§7[Higgs Boson]§f
§b• 8× Uranium Ingot§f + Higgs Boson Capsule → §e8× Schraranium Ingot§f
§b• 8× U-238 Ingot§f + Higgs Boson Capsule → §e8× Schrabidium Ingot§f

§7[Dark Matter]§f
§b• 8× Plutonium Ingot§f + Dark Matter Capsule → §e8× Euphemium Ingot§f

§7[Sparkticle]§f
§b• 8× Ferric Schrabidate Ingot§f + Sparkticle Capsule → §e8× Dineutronium Ingot§f

§eTip§f: The Exposure Chamber consumes 10 kHE/t and has a 1 MHE buffer. Ensure you have sufficient power before running it. Each capsule gives 8 operations, so stockpile capsules before starting production runs!
